title: 05596_MLLM-as-a-Judge_Assessing_Multimodal_LLM-as-a-Judge_with_Vision-Language_Benchmark
positive_examples: Establishes a benchmark to improve MLLMs' alignment with human cognitive processes.
Aims to create more ethically principled and socially beneficial MLLM systems.
negative_examples: Bias in human annotation and MLLMs.
Potential for biased judgments due to the limitations of current MLLM systems.
